_comment: Shared cross-language test fixture for groundedwork. Python and TS suites both run this so behavior is provably identical. Synthetic 'Nimbus' coffee company corpus.

corpus.title: Returns & Refunds
corpus.body: Not happy with your beans? Return any unopened bag within 30 days for a full refund. Opened bags qualify for store credit. Email support to start a refund.
corpus.answer: You can return any unopened bag within 30 days for a full refund. Opened bags get store credit â just email support to start it.

corpus.title: US Shipping
corpus.body: Domestic orders arrive in 3 to 5 business days via standard shipping. Orders over forty dollars ship free. Tracking is emailed when your order leaves the roastery.
corpus.answer: US orders arrive in 3â5 business days. Free shipping over $40, and you'll get tracking by email when it leaves the roastery.

corpus.title: International Shipping
corpus.body: We ship worldwide. International delivery takes 7 to 14 business days. Customs fees are the customer's responsibility and are not included at checkout.
corpus.answer: We ship worldwide â international delivery is 7â14 business days. Heads up: customs fees aren't included and are paid by you.

corpus.title: Subscription Plans
corpus.body: Three subscription tiers: Starter is one bag monthly, Pro is two bags monthly, Connoisseur is four bags plus early access to rare lots. Switch tiers anytime.
corpus.answer: Three plans: Starter (1 bag/mo), Pro (2 bags/mo), and Connoisseur (4 bags + early access to rare lots). You can switch anytime.

corpus.title: Pausing Your Subscription
corpus.body: Need a break? Pause your subscription for up to three months from your account dashboard. Billing and shipments stop while paused and resume automatically.
corpus.answer: You can pause for up to 3 months right from your dashboard. Billing and shipments stop while paused, then resume automatically.

corpus.title: Cancelling
corpus.body: Cancel anytime with no fee from account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle. You keep access until then.
corpus.answer: Cancel anytime, no fee, from account settings. It takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle â you keep access until then.

corpus.title: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
corpus.body: Our Ethiopia Yirgacheffe is a bright, floral light roast with notes of jasmine, bergamot, and lemon. Grown at high altitude and washed processed.
corpus.answer: The Ethiopia Yirgacheffe is a bright, floral light roast â jasmine, bergamot, and lemon. High-altitude, washed process.

corpus.title: Colombia Supremo
corpus.body: Colombia Supremo is a balanced medium roast with caramel sweetness, milk chocolate, and a soft red-apple acidity. A crowd-pleasing everyday cup.
corpus.answer: Colombia Supremo is a balanced medium roast: caramel, milk chocolate, soft red-apple acidity. A great everyday cup.

corpus.title: Sumatra Mandheling
corpus.body: Sumatra Mandheling is a bold, earthy dark roast with cedar, dark chocolate, and low acidity. Heavy body, great for espresso and French press.
corpus.answer: Sumatra Mandheling is a bold, earthy dark roast â cedar, dark chocolate, low acidity, heavy body. Excellent in espresso or French press.

corpus.title: Roast Levels
corpus.body: Light roast keeps origin flavor and acidity. Medium balances sweetness and body. Dark roast is bold and smoky. Each bag is labeled with its roast level.
corpus.answer: Light = bright and acidic, keeps origin character. Medium = balanced sweetness and body. Dark = bold and smoky. Every bag is labeled.

corpus.title: Grind Sizes
corpus.body: Coarse grind suits French press, medium suits drip and pour over, fine suits espresso. We grind to order or ship whole bean for maximum freshness.
corpus.answer: Coarse for French press, medium for drip/pour-over, fine for espresso. We grind to order, or ship whole bean for max freshness.

corpus.title: French Press Guide
corpus.body: For French press use a coarse grind, a one to fifteen coffee to water ratio, water just off the boil, and a four minute steep before pressing slowly.
corpus.answer: French press: coarse grind, 1:15 coffee-to-water, water just off the boil, steep 4 minutes, then press slowly.

corpus.title: Pour-Over Guide
corpus.body: For pour over use a medium grind, rinse the filter, bloom with twice the coffee weight in water for thirty seconds, then pour in slow spirals.
corpus.answer: Pour-over: medium grind, rinse the filter, bloom 30 seconds with 2Ã the coffee weight in water, then pour in slow spirals.

corpus.title: Espresso Guide
corpus.body: For espresso use a fine grind and an eighteen gram dose, aim for a twenty five to thirty second extraction yielding about thirty six grams in the cup.
corpus.answer: Espresso: fine grind, 18 g dose, aim for a 25â30 second shot pulling about 36 g out. Adjust grind to hit the time.

corpus.title: Decaf Options
corpus.body: Every coffee is available decaffeinated using the Swiss Water process, which removes caffeine without chemical solvents while keeping flavor intact.
corpus.answer: Yes â every coffee comes in decaf, made with the chemical-free Swiss Water process that keeps the flavor intact.

corpus.title: Gift Subscriptions
corpus.body: Gift subscriptions come in three, six, or twelve month prepaid options. The recipient picks their own coffees and there is no auto-renewal on gifts.
corpus.answer: Gift subscriptions come prepaid in 3, 6, or 12 months. The recipient chooses their own coffees, and gifts never auto-renew.

corpus.title: Referral Program
corpus.body: Refer a friend and you both get a free bag. Share your referral link from your dashboard. The reward applies after your friend's first order ships.
corpus.answer: Refer a friend and you both get a free bag. Grab your link in the dashboard â the reward lands after their first order ships.

corpus.title: Storing Your Beans
corpus.body: Store beans in an airtight container away from light, heat, and moisture. Do not refrigerate. Use within four weeks of the roast date for peak flavor.
corpus.answer: Keep beans airtight, away from light, heat, and moisture â don't refrigerate. Best within 4 weeks of the roast date.

corpus.title: Payment Methods
corpus.body: We accept all major credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. Payment is processed securely and your card is charged on your billing date.
corpus.answer: We take all major cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. Everything's processed securely and charged on your billing date.

corpus.title: Billing Cycle
corpus.body: Subscriptions bill on the same day each month, the date of your first order. You receive an email receipt and a reminder three days before each charge.
corpus.answer: You're billed monthly on the date of your first order. You'll get a receipt by email plus a reminder 3 days before each charge.

corpus.title: Office & Bulk Orders
corpus.body: Office and bulk orders over ten bags get volume pricing and a dedicated account manager. Contact our sales team for a custom quote and invoicing.
corpus.answer: Bulk and office orders over 10 bags get volume pricing and a dedicated account manager. Contact sales for a custom quote.

corpus.title: Sustainability
corpus.body: We buy direct trade, pay above fair-trade prices, and ship in compostable bags. A portion of every subscription funds reforestation at origin farms.
corpus.answer: We're direct-trade, pay above fair-trade, and ship in compostable bags. Part of every subscription funds reforestation at origin.

corpus.title: Loyalty Points
corpus.body: Earn one point per dollar spent. One hundred points equals a free bag. Points never expire and stack with referral rewards. Track them in your dashboard.
corpus.answer: You earn 1 point per $1; 100 points = a free bag. Points never expire and stack with referral rewards. Track them in your dashboard.

corpus.title: Contact Support
corpus.body: Reach support by email any day from seven in the morning to nine at night Eastern, or by live chat on weekdays. Typical reply time is under two hours.
corpus.answer: Email support 7amâ9pm ET any day, or live chat on weekdays. We usually reply in under 2 hours.

cases.query: How do I get a refund?
What subscription plans do you have?
Tell me about your Ethiopia coffee
How do I make a pour over?
When does it show up at my door?
cases.note: paraphrase FAILURE: 'show up at my door' shares no real words with the shipping doc ('arrive in 3-5 days'), but the stopword-ish 'up' coincidentally matches 'Pausing' — keyword retrieval returns a confidently-WRONG neighbor. This is the paraphrase wall; only embeddings (v0.2) fix it.
